channel.title: Journal of Imagery Research in Sport and Physical Activity
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Imagery Research in Sport and Physical Activity

item.title: Effects of a single session of motor imagery and action observation plus physical exercise on lumbo-pelvic sensorimotor function in healthy women: a randomized controlled pilot trial
item.description: Article by Anna Christakou, Vasiliki Siampanou, Dimitrios Spagoulakis, George A. Koumantakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2024-0018

item.title: Memorizing soccer tactics through immersive and non-immersive visualizations: the moderating effect of visuospatial abilities
item.description: Article by Anna Christakou, Vasiliki Siampanou, Dimitrios Spagoulakis, George A. Koumantakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2024-0005

item.title: Pain characteristics and imagery ability in patients with familial Mediterranean fever
item.description: Article by Anna Christakou, Vasiliki Siampanou, Dimitrios Spagoulakis, George A. Koumantakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2023-0025

item.title: Cardiorespiratory response patterns during multifunctional imagery-assisted biofeedback training – a case study
item.description: Article by Anna Christakou, Vasiliki Siampanou, Dimitrios Spagoulakis, George A. Koumantakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2023-0039

item.title: The effects of PETTLEP imagery and action observation on strength performance of a leg extension and flexion task
item.description: Article by Anna Christakou, Vasiliki Siampanou, Dimitrios Spagoulakis, George A. Koumantakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2023-0030

item.title: Imagery use gender differences across competition and training contexts in Australian elite level athletes
item.description: Article by Anna Christakou, Vasiliki Siampanou, Dimitrios Spagoulakis, George A. Koumantakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2023-0034

item.title: Cross-cultural adaptation, reliability and validity of the Greek version of the Movement Imagery Questionnaire-3 (MIQ-3)
item.description: Article by Anna Christakou, Vasiliki Siampanou, Dimitrios Spagoulakis, George A. Koumantakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2023-0035
